ui.title: ✨ Equestria OS Essentials
desc.unityhub: Official Unity project and version manager
desc.steampipe-gui: Steam Build Publishing Manager written by Psyche Games
desc.rider: Powerful cross-platform IDE for C# and Unity from JetBrains
desc.gitnuro: A free and modern graphical client for Git
desc.opensourcetree: SourceTree-inspired Git GUI built with PyQt6
desc.blender: A complete package for 3D modeling and animation
desc.gimp: A powerful raster graphics editor (similar to Photoshop)
desc.imagefinish: A Photoshop-inspired image editor for Linux
desc.steam: The largest game store and Valve platform
desc.steamvr: The virtual reality platform from Valve
desc.sidequest: VR game store and download tool (Oculus Quest)
desc.protonup: Installer Custom Proton (GE) versions for gaming
desc.haruna: Fast and modern video player for KDE
desc.vlc: Omnivorous media player with built-in codecs
desc.obs: The industry standard for video recording and streaming
desc.okular: Universal PDF and document viewer from KDE
desc.discord: Voice and text chat for gamers
desc.qbittorrent: Lightweight and powerful torrent client without ads
desc.flatpak: A container system for installing isolated applications
desc.nvidia: Official NVIDIA DKMS drivers for optimal gaming performance and hardware acceleration
desc.nvidia_utils: Essential NVIDIA utilities and 32-bit libraries required for Steam and Wine compatibility
desc.nvidia_set: Graphical tool for configuring the NVIDIA display driver and monitors
desc.asusctl: Core daemon for ASUS ROG/TUF laptops (fan curves, keyboard LEDs, battery charge limits)
desc.supergfx: GPU switching utility for ASUS Optimus laptops (Hybrid / Dedicated / Integrated modes)
desc.rog: Graphical interface for managing ASUS laptop features via asusctl and supergfxctl
desc.intel_ucode: Microcode update files for Intel CPUs to ensure system stability and security
desc.amd_ucode: Microcode update files for AMD CPUs to ensure system stability and security
desc.bluez: Official Linux Bluetooth protocol stack and command-line utilities
desc.cups: Standards-based, open source printing system and virtual PDF printer
desc.xpadneo: Advanced Linux driver for Xbox One wireless gaming controllers (Bluetooth)
desc.hplip: Hewlett-Packard Linux Imaging and Printing - official drivers for HP printers and scanners
desc.sane: Universal drivers for flatbed scanners and modern network/Wi-Fi scanners (Apple AirPrint/Mopria)
desc.dualsense: Advanced tool for Sony DualSense (battery, LED) and essential udev rules for all gamepads
desc.xone: Modern Linux driver for Xbox One and Series X|S controllers (supports official wireless dongle)
desc.broadcom: Proprietary Broadcom wireless drivers for troublesome Wi-Fi chipsets (BCM43142, BCM43224, etc.)
desc.solaar: Device manager for Logitech Unifying, Bolt, and Lightspeed receivers (battery, DPI, pairing)
desc.openrazer: Open-source driver and graphical frontend for Razer mice, keyboards, and headsets (RGB and macros)
desc.wacom: Official Linux drivers and libraries for Wacom graphics tablets and drawing displays
desc.displaylink: Drivers for DisplayLink USB docking stations and external monitors
ui.update_desc: Are you sure you want to update all system packages (Pacman, AUR, Flatpak, Snap)?
ui.aur_warning: ⚠ Community package — not officially verified, may not work as expected.
ui.flatpak_init_desc: To access Flathub apps, Flatpak needs to be initialized (~50 MB download).
ui.flatpak_not_installed_desc: Install Flatpak to access thousands of Flathub applications.
